scripts.build:native: cd src/rust && pnpm exec napi build --manifest-path crates/napi/Cargo.toml --release --platform --js native.js --dts native.d.ts --output-dir .
scripts.build:copy-native: cp src/rust/native.js src/rust/native.d.ts dist/ && cp src/rust/native.*.node dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: pnpm run build:native && pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run build:copy-native && pnpm run build:barrel
